summary: Today's sweep leans toward Games / criticism, AI / computing, Democracy / anti-fascism. The strongest items in this run are Google’s Gemini AI can answer your questions with 3D models and simulations, Castlevania headlines a big list of exciting indie game reveals, and Over the Hill looks like SnowRunner's cosy off-roading cousin, and its new trailer shows off muddy motoring in Algeria ahead of release later this year.

mainItems.title: Google’s Gemini AI can answer your questions with 3D models and simulations
mainItems.summary: Google's latest upgrade for Gemini will allow the chatbot to generate interactive 3D models and simulations in response to your questions.
mainItems.whyItMatters: Relevant to the shape of current AI systems and where the tooling is moving.

mainItems.title: Castlevania headlines a big list of exciting indie game reveals
mainItems.summary: A big indie showcase has just wrapped up, and now I have a lot more games to look forward to. The third iteration of the Triple-I Initiative, an annual showcase for upcoming releases put on by a group of studios, aired on Thursday.
mainItems.whyItMatters: Relevant to the shape of current AI systems and where the tooling is moving.

mainItems.title: Over the Hill looks like SnowRunner's cosy off-roading cousin, and its new trailer shows off muddy motoring in Algeria ahead of release later this year
mainItems.summary: I've really dug Funselektor's minimalistic and relaxed vibe-heavy arcade racers over the past few years. Absolute Drift 's brill, Art Of Rally 's great, and I also liked retro F1 management sim Golden Lap .
mainItems.whyItMatters: Worth your time if you care about design, criticism, and not just hype.

mainItems.title: Meta debuts new AI model in first test of costly ‘superintelligence’ team
mainItems.summary: Muse Spark was competitive with models from OpenAI, Google and Anthropic in language, but lagged in coding Sign up for the Breaking News US email to get newsletter alerts in your inbox Meta on Wednesday unveiled Muse Spark, the first…
mainItems.whyItMatters: Worth watching for authoritarian drift, selective enforcement, and democratic norms.

mainItems.title: Crop is Stardew Valley except you arrive at your farm naked and in the boot of a car
mainItems.summary: Even the cosiest of cosy games can have melancholy openings. In Stardew Valley , for instance, your elderly grandfather passes away, bequeathing you his rundown farm.
mainItems.whyItMatters: Worth your time if you care about design, criticism, and not just hype.

mainItems.title: Police corporal created AI porn from driver's license pics
mainItems.whyItMatters: Relevant to state power, civil liberties, and anti-authoritarian concerns.

mainItems.title: Opinion: In America’s First Solar-powered Town, Education Options Abound
mainItems.summary: As soon as Amanda Pacheco stepped onto the streets of Babcock Ranch — a fast-growing, master-planned community near Fort Myers, Florida — she knew it was where she and her family belonged.
mainItems.whyItMatters: Directly relevant to teaching, classroom practice, and educational judgment.

mainItems.title: Art of Rally studio's Over the Hill gets an alpha playtest this month, and a fancy new trailer with some fresh reveals
mainItems.summary: Over the Hill, the off-roading exploration game from the studio behind Art of Rally , has received a new trailer during the latest indie-focused Triple-i Initiative showcase.
mainItems.whyItMatters: Worth your time if you care about design, criticism, and not just hype.

mainItems.title: How our digital devices are putting our right to privacy at risk
mainItems.summary: Law professor Andrew Guthrie Ferguson chats with Ars about his new book, Your Data Will Be Used Against You .
mainItems.whyItMatters: Touches trust, surveillance, and the private use of AI systems.

mainItems.title: Frank Castle Is Having a Pretty Bad Time in The Punisher: One Last Kill Trailer
mainItems.summary: THIS one's the last one. No, THIS one's the last one. No ... The post Frank Castle Is Having a Pretty Bad Time in The Punisher: One Last Kill Trailer appeared first on Reactor .
mainItems.whyItMatters: On-theme for your cultural interests, especially when the concept is strong.

mainItems.title: This doctor turned a 31-foot RV into one of the country's only mobile OB-GYN clinics
mainItems.summary: Mary Fariba Afsari's book, Labor, is a portrait of reproductive healthcare in post- Dobbs America. Her book also is about her Iranian heritage and her grandmother's death from an illegal abortion.
mainItems.whyItMatters: Relevant to your current interest graph.

mainItems.title: Farmer Arrested for Speaking Too Long at Datacenter Town Hall Vows to Fight
mainItems.summary: Darren Blanchard went a few seconds over his three minute time limit and found himself in handcuffs.
mainItems.whyItMatters: Relevant to your current interest graph.

mainItems.title: How can I get a more bubbly, open crumb in my focaccia?: Two key focaccia tips from our recent podcast episode.
mainItems.summary: In every episode of our podcast Things Bakers Know , we answer baking questions from our listeners.
mainItems.whyItMatters: Lower-stakes, but high fit for the maker/craft side of your brain.
